expectations.text: Response includes a preflight report (either '## Preflight:' header or 'Preflight HCI_SendDataPkt:' shorthand)
expectations.evidence: Response includes preflight header. Skill triggered correctly on 'Implement' keyword with ADJUST PLAN verdict.

expectations.text: Preflight report appears before the code or edit steps
expectations.evidence: Preflight ran first during planning: call graph RISK (structurally dead retry path), resources RISK (buffer leaks on each retry). Adjusted plan listed after preflight findings.
